ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "dispnum" INTEGER /* Displacement number */,
  "incidnum" INTEGER /* Incident number */,
  "stabb" TEXT /* Country abbreviation (e.g., USA, CAN, UKG) */,
  "ccode" INTEGER /* Country code */,
  "stday" INTEGER /* Start day of the incident */,
  "stmon" INTEGER /* Start month of the incident */,
  "styear" INTEGER /* Start year of the incident */,
  "endday" INTEGER /* End day of the incident */,
  "endmon" INTEGER /* End month of the incident */,
  "endyear" INTEGER /* End year of the incident */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the incident (e.g., economic, social) */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_stabb FOREIGN KEY ("stabb") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the participant was involved in */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., attacker, victim) */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of participant (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_participants_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the location is associated with */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, country) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_versions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_notes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PDF, image) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_documents_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the media file belongs to */,
  "media_name" TEXT /* Name of the media file */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media file (e.g., video, image) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_media_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_tags_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_sources_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the theme belongs to */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_themes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
